description_long: This is a large, modern SUV with a robust and boxy silhouette, featuring four passenger doors and a rear cargo area. The exterior is finished in a deep black color, with tinted windows and a roof rack visible on top, suggesting utility and off-road capability. The front grille is wide and prominent, flanked by rectangular headlights, while the rear is squared off with a subtle bumper and tail lights. The side profile reveals pronounced wheel arches and blacked-out wheels, giving the vehicle a rugged, urban-ready appearance. The SUV's body panels are smooth and glossy, with minimal ornamentation, emphasizing a contemporary design. The likely interior materials include fabric or leather seating, plastic trim, and glass windows, typical of modern SUVs.
description: A large, black, boxy SUV with four doors, tinted windows, roof rack, and black wheels, designed for urban and utility use. The exterior is smooth and glossy, with a modern, robust appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide grille, rectangular headlights, and the bold, upright stance of the SUV.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the four doors, roof rack, tinted windows, and black wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the squared-off back, rear bumper, and tail lights, with the roof rack visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the doors, windows, and overall length of the SUV.
attribute_wheel_design: black wheels with a solid, multi-spoke design
